name: acestep-cpp-api
description: AceStep 1.5 API proxy using acestep.cpp (ace-lm + ace-synth), built with Bun

scripts.build: bun run bundle:acestep && bun build ./src/index.ts --compile --minify --sourcemap=external --outfile ./dist/acestep-api && bun run sync:runtime
scripts.build:windows: bun run bundle:acestep && bun build ./src/index.ts --compile --minify --sourcemap=external --outfile ./dist/acestep-api.exe && bun run sync:runtime
scripts.build:all: bun run build && bun run build:windows
scripts.daw:build: (cd ACE-Step-DAW && npm install && npx vite build)
